boundary: This manifest prepares the v1.6.11 versus v1.0 performance comparison. It does not publish v1.6.11, authorize a tag, or authorize public speedup wording. Final evidence needs a pod because OptiX/NVIDIA RT rows require real NVIDIA RT hardware.

pod_run_contract.build_policy: Build Embree and OptiX separately in each checkout from that checkout's source. Record commit, GPU, driver, CUDA, OptiX SDK, and build command.
pod_run_contract.checkout_policy: Use two clean checkouts or worktrees on the pod: one at tag v1.0 and one at current main for the v1.6.11 release candidate.
pod_run_contract.comparison_policy: Compare only rows where both versions complete the same engine command with accepted parity/status. Missing v1.0 script or schema drift must be reported as unsupported, not as slower or faster.

acceptance: same artifact schema or explicit schema-drift note
rows.claim_boundary: This row compares v1.6.11 against v1.0 for the same engine. It is not a public speedup claim unless the final artifacts pass parity, phase metadata, and 3-AI review.

acceptance: same artifact schema or explicit schema-drift note
